description: 1. Round section handles for easy transportation2. Ample space3. 100% polyester outer, 100% polyamide inner4. Reinforced bottom of bag for durability5. 11.5" length x 15" breadthEasy to carry, easy to maintain and easy on the pockets: The ideal bag for Sports lovers who would like to carry all their things in one large pack! A pocket especially made for the damp and dirty after-gym clothes, makes sure that the hygiene never goes out of your routine!Easy care: Wash with clean water
